key_theorem: Ring-Depth Physics Theorem (S311): QFT path integral = two-level ring {2,3}: classical action(EML-2) ↔ quantum oscillation(EML-3). NEW: EFT MATCHING = TYPE 1 DEPTH REDUCTION: UV theory (quantum loops = EML-3) → IR EFT (Wilson coefficients = EML-2): Δd=-1. The physical procedure of 'integrating out' heavy modes IS the TYPE 1 depth reduction. Feynman diagrams: tree=EML-2; loops=EML-3; Tree⊗Loop = EML-∞ (explains UV/IR divergences). Divergences arise because loop integrals (EML-3) mix with tree amplitudes (EML-2) = cross-type. RG flow = EML-2; fixed points = TYPE 2 Horizons. Ring structure provides a new organizing principle for QFT calculations.
rabbit_hole_log: Path integral: two-level {2,3} (classical action EML-2, exp(iS) EML-3)
NEW: EFT matching = TYPE 1 depth reduction Δd=-1 (UV→IR = EML-3→EML-2)
RG flow: EML-2; RG fixed points = TYPE 2 Horizons
Ring structure organizes QFT: divergences = cross-type; EFT = depth reduction
